summary: CRO Payment Verification Workflow Testing Complete - Backend 100% (14/14), Frontend UI Verified. Complete workflow: CRO creates project → submits for payment verification → Accountant verifies with transaction ID → CRO submits to Planning. All 5 status tabs working.
seed_data_creation: Test projects created with TEST_ prefix during workflow testing. Existing packages: Basic Package (A), VALUE FOR MONEY (B), Builders Choice (E2E).
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRO Payment Verification Workflow fully functional. Flow: Draft → pending_payment → payment_verified → planning_review. Accountant adds transaction_id when verifying. CRO Board shows 5 status tabs: Draft, Pending Payment, Payment Received, In Planning, Approved. Workflow banner displays correct flow.

cro_creates_project_with_advance_payment.details: CRO can create project with advance_amount, advance_date, advance_payment_mode fields

cro_submits_for_payment_verification.details: Draft projects with advance payment can be submitted, status changes to 'pending_payment'

accountant_sees_new_requests.details: Accountant dashboard shows pending advance payments count and list in 'New Requests' tab

accountant_verifies_with_transaction_id.details: Accountant can verify payment with transaction_id, bank_name, remarks. Status changes to 'payment_verified'

cro_sees_payment_received.details: CRO Board 'Payment Received' tab shows projects with 'payment_verified' status

cro_submits_to_planning.details: CRO can submit verified projects to Planning. Status changes to 'planning_review'

planning_receives_project.details: Planning user can see project in 'planning_review' status

dashboard_5_status_counts.details: CRO Dashboard shows: draft_count, pending_payment_count, payment_verified_count, planning_review_count, approved_count

accountant_can_reject_payment.details: Rejected projects go back to 'draft' with rejection reason stored

validation_rules.details: Cannot submit without advance payment, cannot submit to Planning without verification, only Accountant can verify

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/cro/projects: PASS - Creates project with advance payment fields
api_endpoints_tested.PATCH /api/accounts/verify-advance-payme: PASS - Verifies payment with transaction ID
api_endpoints_tested.PATCH /api/cro/projects/{id}/submit-to-p: PASS - Submits verified project to Planning
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/accounts/dashboard: PASS - Returns pending advance payments count

ui_verified.cro_board_5_status_cards: PASS - Draft (8), Pending Payment (4), Payment Received (2), In Planning (8), Approved (0)
ui_verified.workflow_banner: PASS - Draft → Submit for Payment → Accountant Verifies → Payment Received → Send to Planning
ui_verified.5_tabs: PASS - Draft, Pending Payment, Payment Received, In Planning, Approved
ui_verified.create_project_dialog: PASS - All fields including Advance Payment Details (Required) section
ui_verified.action_buttons: PASS - Submit for Verification, Awaiting Accountant badge, Send to Planning
ui_verified.accounts_board_new_requests: PASS - Verify & Confirm and Reject buttons visible

mocked_apis.none: All APIs are real - no mocked endpoints
